headline: Nintendo’s newest WarioWare is a weirdo smartphone app
summary: Nintendo launches a new WarioWare smartphone app, marking a shift from its past mobile strategy. This comes after earlier mobile ventures like Super Mario platformers didn't meet company expectations. The company has been slowly retreating from aggressive smartphone gaming in recent years.

headline: Microsoft 365 Copilot gets a speed boost and cleaner design
summary: Microsoft 365 Copilot receives a major revamp, featuring a cleaner interface. The updated design promises to load twice as fast and provide more reliable, structured responses. The redesign is rolling out across both desktop and mobile devices.

headline: Amazon’s last-gen Paperwhite is on sale for less than the entry-level Kindle
summary: The 2021 Kindle Paperwhite is currently on sale, priced below the newer entry-level Kindle. Despite its age, the last-gen Paperwhite remains a strong e-reader, especially for outdoor use. Its key advantage is being waterproof, a feature lacking in Amazon's latest basic Kindle model.

headline: Motorola’s last-gen Razr Ultra is almost half off
summary: Motorola's 2025 Razr Ultra foldable phone is available for nearly half its original price. The deal makes the 512GB unlocked model significantly more affordable at $699.99. This offers a budget-friendly option for those interested in Motorola's evolving flip foldable technology.

headline: For All Mankind Season 5, Episode 10 Review — “This Land Is Our Land”
summary: The Season 5 finale of "For All Mankind" closes out the 2010s era. Episode 10, titled "This Land Is Our Land," features a major breakthrough on Saturn's moon. The episode also depicts a period of peace established in Happy Valley.

headline: The Best Shrek Merch to Get In 2026
summary: An article lists the most fascinating Shrek merchandise available in 2026. The compilation celebrates Shrek 25 years after its debut and anticipates Shrek 5. It offers a guide for fans looking to purchase unique Shrek-themed items online.

headline: The 34" MSI Optix WQHD 144Hz Gaming Monitor Offers Excellent Value for Just $174 Shipped
summary: A 34-inch MSI Optix WQHD 144Hz gaming monitor is on sale for $174, including shipping. The monitor is brand new and comes with a 1-year MSI warranty. This deal presents excellent value for a high-performance gaming display.

headline: The 2026 MacBook Air With New Apple M5 Chip Drops to the Lowest Price Ever for Memorial Day
summary: The 2026 MacBook Air, featuring the new Apple M5 chip, is at its lowest price ever. Amazon is offering the laptop for $200 less than the Apple Store during Memorial Day sales. This presents a significant discount for those looking to purchase the latest MacBook Air model.

headline: US and Iran 'very close' to deal but 'not there yet', Vance says
summary: US and Iran are reportedly "very close" to agreeing on a deal. US officials previously indicated a ceasefire extension framework had been agreed upon. Final approval from Trump and Iran's leadership is still pending.

headline: Moment Blue Origin rocket explodes during test in Florida
summary: A Blue Origin New Glenn rocket exploded during a test on a launch pad. The incident occurred on Thursday night at Cape Canaveral in Florida. The explosion happened during a test of the New Glenn rocket.

headline: SAS troops accused of war crimes not referred to police over morale fears, inquiry hears
summary: An inquiry reveals SAS troops accused of war crimes were not reported to police. The decision was allegedly made due to concerns over military morale. This delay meant allegations of extra-judicial killings were withheld from military police for years.

headline: Epstein survivors lack faith in UK police investigating Andrew, says lawyer
summary: A lawyer for Epstein survivors states clients distrust UK police investigating Prince Andrew. Survivors express concerns about the treatment they would receive from UK authorities. The lack of confidence stems from the ongoing investigation into Prince Andrew's alleged links to Epstein.
